text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the academy, I come across El Condor Pasa
and Mejiro Dober talking in the hallway.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Next week, it's finally happening! Handshakes! Singing! Dancing! A super-fun social exchange with all our fans!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Haha. You're so full of energy, El. Me, on the
other hand... I'm so nervous my hands are shaking.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Don't sweat it! You're just shaking with
excitement! Let's really enjoy this event, okay?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I even sent my mask to the cleaners!
They're going to restore it to its ultimate glory!
I'm already itching for the day so I can wear it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... Today's the day. Are you ready?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Maybe... not...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What? Why?! And where's your mask?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I was expecting to get it back from the cleaners
this morning, but... there was a mistake, and it's
going to take a little more time...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But... I can't keep everyone waiting. I have no
choice but to do this maskless.

text_block_list.name: Event Staff
text_block_list.text:
Without further ado, I'd like to welcome to the
stage El Condor Pasa and Mejiro Dober!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Urk... H-hello, everyone...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I feel honored that... so many of you have, uh...
come to this event today.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
What's going on? She's not wearing her mask...
And she's acting totally different from usual.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
U-um! Thank you, everyone, for attending our
event t-today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-I was so excited for it that I... um, couldn't sleep last night. Well, I mean—I did get some sleep!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
(Dober's no good at this kinda stuff, but she's
trying so hard for my sake! And look at me!)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
(I am without my mask... But! I'm not without
courage! And if I muster all the courage I have,
then!)

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
M-me too! I was so excited last night that I didn't
sleep a wink!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But that's because I just couldn't wait to have the
greatest, most fantástico, all-out day ever with all
of you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: E-El!

text_block_list.name: Cleaner
text_block_list.text:
Heeey! Sorry about earlier, El! Here's your mask!
All nice and clean!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Qué?! For real?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to have kept y'all waitin'! That goes for you,
too, Dober!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The revival, the rebirth—the great arrival of the true El Condor Pasaaaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Thank you so much, Dober. I was really
worried for a minute there!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Guess I'm no good without my mask after all.
Haha...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's not true. You showed a ton of courage
even without it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Your mask is really important too, that's for sure,
but... that courage to take on anything—you had
it all along.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So, you're saying that maybe my heart wears its own mask of courage?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: My running is the best, my heart is the best—I am the best! Wow! I feel like I could jump over the moon right now!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...But, you know, I only found that courage
because you did your best to help me out!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's just like I said when I introduced us at that
trial wrestling lesson—we really are the best tag
team ever!
